name: block-env-bash
description: Prevent bash commands that attempt to read credential files. Fail-closed by returning non-zero when suspicious paths are detected.

name: block-env-read
description: Prevent read-tool access to credential files. Fail-closed by returning non-zero when suspicious paths are detected.

name: block-destructive-ops
description: Block destructive operations like `git push` when running against cloned analysis repos under /tmp/repo-analyzer-*.
